summary: Iteration 2 re-test after main agent fixes: brand lookup, scope enforcement order, file download RBAC. All 23 backend tests pass (was 14/22 in iter_1). Frontend UI testing also verified: login + 4 admin pages render, store user can access request create form, Kanban shows exactly 5 columns with 7 cards, approval user can claim -> release-btn appears, lock semantics correct.

issues: Form input fields (sales_number, customer_name, total/cost amount, reason, etc.) lack data-testid attributes; only mağaza select uses one. Recommend adding for testability.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid attrs to RequestCreate form inputs for better playwright coverage (low priority).
critical_code_review_comments: CORS allow_credentials=False but the app also relies on httpOnly cookies for auth — fine since frontend uses Bearer header. Just be aware cookie-based auth from a different origin will not work.
list_requests scope ordering now correctly enforces store_user.store_id AFTER user-provided filters (server.py:399-401). Verified by test_store_user_sees_only_own.
Brand lookup in create_request uses store['brand'] string match against db.brands.name (server.py:337). Works for non-ASCII 'Arçelik'. Verified min_profit_pct=15.0 in test fixture new_request.
download_file now reloads user from DB and enforces store_user store scope (server.py:566-573). Verified by new test_download_file_cross_store_forbidden.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_crm.py (fixed test_create_user uppercase email assertion; added test_download_file_cross_store_forbidden)
test_credentials: All 7 seed accounts from /app/memory/test_credentials.md verified working.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data (sample requests + brands + stores + users). Created TEST_ prefixed requests/users during tests; not cleaned up but harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_crm.py is comprehensive (23 tests covering auth, dashboard, request CRUD, claim-lock concurrency with Turkish error, RBAC for users/brands/cross-store, file upload/download cross-store, audit). For frontend, use [data-testid="quick-admin/manager/approval/store"] then login-submit-btn. Kanban has [data-testid^="kanban-col-"] and [data-testid^="kanban-card-"]. RequestDetail has claim-btn, release-btn, locked-by (shown only to non-assignee).
rca_of_the_issue: Iter_1 issues resolved: (1) brand lookup string-id mismatch fixed by switching to {name:store['brand']} match (server.py:337); (2) min_profit_pct=15.0 confirmed in tests; (3) list_requests scope precedence fixed; (4) download_file RBAC added.
